hooks.command: if [[ "$QODER_FILE" == *.java ]]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/weblog-springboot" && mvn spotless:apply -pl "$(basename $(dirname "$QODER_FILE"))" -Dspotless.include="$QODER_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$QODER_FILE" == *.vue || "$QODER_FILE" == *.js || "$QODER_FILE" == *.ts || "$QODER_FILE" == *.css ]]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/weblog-vue3" && npx prettier --write "$QODER_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
